sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109761" key="u(stero/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑστερό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounding after, echoing,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.153</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
